title: Cattleya duveenii

taxonomy: Cattleya duveenii is a species of orchid that belongs to the subtribe Laeliinae. This subtribe is part of the tribe Epidendreae within the family Orchidaceae. The tribe Epidendreae is further classified under the subfamily Epidendroideae, which is one of the 6 subfamilies of the Orchidaceae family. Orchidaceae is the largest and most diverse family of flowering plants, with over 30,000 known species. Cattleya duveenii is native to Costa Rica.
